narrative: Bitcoin fell through $60K for the first time this quarter, on track for a rare back-to-back quarterly loss as spot ETF outflows hit a record $4 billion for June per CoinDesk. Solana (+1.98%) bucked the broader selloff, lifted by tokenized stock momentum and Aave ecosystem activity per CoinDesk; Iran de-escalation lifted equity futures but crypto barely moved, underscoring the persistent AI-rotation headwind. Strategy's mNAV fell below 1 for the first time — the premium that enabled its leveraged BTC accumulation has erased — while Saylor teased more buying and analysts remain split on whether the bottom is in per CoinDesk.
worth_watching: BitMEX leadership purge — CEO, CFO, and head of growth removed simultaneously; not a watchlist coin but signals distress at a major derivatives venue per CoinDesk

Tether $23B gold tokenization push — expanding bullion-backed loans with Ledn; largest stablecoin issuer pivoting to yield-bearing gold products is a structural shift in stablecoin utility not tracked in watchlist coins per CoinDesk

Framework's $400M tokenization-for-AI fund — positioning tokenization as the capital layer for AI and robotics rather than crypto-native speculation; a new investor thesis that could redirect institutional flows independently of BTC/ETH/SOL per CoinDesk
